data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Encryption applied throughout the data journey from client to server.
data.technical_spec: Use of TLS/SSL protocols for secure data transmission.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Ongoing examination and remediation of security vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Formal audits performed with internal and external teams.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Additional authentication steps to secure user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Implemented through SMS and/or app-based methods.

data.title: Bot Detection Mechanisms
data.description: Systems designed to identify and mitigate bot-related threats.
data.technical_spec: Integration of CAPTCHA and anomaly detection algorithms.

data.title: Vulnerability Management Program
data.description: A structured approach to address emerging threats and vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Proactive response strategies and patch management.
